sections.paragraph:
περισσεύω [περισσός]

—1. intr. ‘be above or beyond in number, amount, or quality’

—a. of things abound, be in abundance Mt 5:20; Ro 5:15; 2 Cor 1:5; Phil 1:9; grow Ac 16:5. In ptc. construction τὸ/τὰ π. = the surplus Mt 14:20; 15:37; Mk 12:44; Lk 9:17; 21:4; J 6:12.

—b. of pers. abound (in), be rich (in) Lk 15:17 v.l.; Ro 15:13; 2 Cor 9:8b; Phil 4:12; Col 2:7; be outstanding, excel 1 Cor 14:12; 15:58; in 1 Th 4:1, 10 the addition of μάλλον invites the rendering superabound. Commercial imagery in the sense make/show a profit appears to be present in Ro 3:7; 1 Cor 8:8; 2 Cor 8:2, 7; Phil 4:18.

—2. tr. cause to abound 2 Cor 4:15; 9:8a; Eph 1:8; 1 Th 3:12; pass.: will be enriched/will enjoy a surplus Mt 13:12; 25:29; get more than enough Lk 15:17 (reading περισσεύονται as pass.).
